The only workspace manager your server needs

Streamline your Discord server support, member onboarding, automated roles management, and custom auto-responders under a single, beautiful workspace. Privacy-focused by design.

Interactive Demo
Nora Support Ticket Hub Need help? Click the appropriate category button below to launch a secure ticket channel. Our staff team will be paged instantly.

Unlimited Ticket Panels

Deploy highly customizable ticket panels with granular staff workflows, role overrides, auto-archiving, and transcripts.

Roblox Verification

Seamlessly bind server roles to Roblox group ranks, ensuring verification flows remain automated and secure.

Invite Tracker logs

Announce precisely which member invited joining users, which invite link was utilized, and count overall inviter stats.

Granular Event Logs

Audit channel actions, voice adjustments, message edits, and joins separately into any channel of your choosing.
